title: T-010 — Drizzle migration: d365_push_dlq table + RLS
prompt:
# T-010 — Drizzle migration: d365_push_dlq

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.11, §12.6, §16.4 V-PROD-13

## Goal
Create d365_push_dlq per §9.11 with idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL (V-PROD-13 open/closed split), RLS.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/d365-push-dlq.ts: PK id UUID, tenant_id NOT NULL, source_outbox_event_id BIGINT REFERENCES production_outbox_events(id), event_type text NOT NULL, payload JSONB NOT NULL, last_error text, attempt_count INTEGER NOT NULL, moved_to_dlq_at default now, resolved_at, resolved_by, resolution_notes text. Index idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL. RLS by tenant_id.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/d365-push-dlq.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_d365_push_dlq.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/d365-push-dlq-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL exists (V-PROD-13)
2. Given INSERT with source_outbox_event_id pointing to non-existent row, when run, then FK violation raised
3. Given migration applied, when SELECT * FROM d365_push_dlq runs without app.tenant_id, then RLS rejects

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting partial index + FK before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test d365-push-dlq-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip RLS (cross-tenant DLQ leak)
- Do not break partial index predicate (impacts query plan)
- Do not weaken FK to outbox

pipeline_inputs.description: d365_push_dlq table with FK to outbox, partial open-row index, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per §9.11 SQL. FK to production_outbox_events(id). idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL. RLS by tenant_id.
out_of_scope: Do not implement DLQ replay UI
Do not implement DLQ admin endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL exists
Given INSERT with non-existent source_outbox_event_id, when run, then FK violation raised
Given non-tenant connection, when SELECT runs without app.tenant_id, then RLS rejects
test_strategy: RED: schema test asserting partial index + FK before schema exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test d365-push-dlq-schema'
